faq.question: What should homeowners know about Simonton Stormbreaker Plus?
faq.answer: Simonton Stormbreaker Plus is part of Simonton's lineup: low-maintenance vinyl collections including DaylightMax with slim frames. Deluxe Windows checks that this collection matches the opening sizes and design goals before recommending it.

faq.question: Which configurations does Simonton Stormbreaker Plus offer?
faq.answer: Styles, sizes, glass packages, colors and hardware for Simonton Stormbreaker Plus depend on the current catalog. Deluxe Windows confirms available configurations for each Bay Area order.

faq.question: How is installed pricing for Simonton Stormbreaker Plus calculated?
faq.answer: Installed pricing for Simonton Stormbreaker Plus reflects opening dimensions, configuration, glass, finish, quantity and access. As a reference, the current promotion prices installations from $499 per window installed (regular $832).

faq.question: How does Simonton Stormbreaker Plus compare with other Simonton collections?
faq.answer: Compare Simonton Stormbreaker Plus with sibling collections on frame construction, visible glass area, energy ratings, finish options, warranty and installed cost. Simonton has been an ENERGY STAR partner since 1999.

faq.question: How do I order Simonton Stormbreaker Plus with installation?
faq.answer: Ordering Simonton Stormbreaker Plus starts with a free on-site measurement; Deluxe Windows then quotes the collection installed, places the factory order and schedules the crew, so one contract covers product, installation and warranty registration.
